word: G3467 - μυωπάζω - myōpázō - moo-ope-ad'-zo - Cannot see far off

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Cannot see far off
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to see dimly, see only what is near
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of the base of G3466 and ωψ ōps (the face: from G3700); to shut the eyes, that is, blink (see indistinctly): - cannot see afar off.
